option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: Release
on: push: tags: - 'v*'
jobs: build: runs-on: ubuntu-latest
steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4
- uses: actions/setup-java@v4 with: java-version: '21' distribution: 'temurin'
- name: Install libcurl run: sudo apt-get install -y libcurl4-openssl-dev
- name: Build native binary run: ./gradlew linkWeatherReleaseExecutableLinux --no-daemon
- name: Upload to GitHub Release uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2 with: files: build/bin/linux/weatherReleaseExecutable/weather.kexe env: GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
